faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Turtle Bay?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment in Turtle Bay typically costs between $350 and $650, depending on the size of your space, severity of the infestation, and number of rooms requiring treatment. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes for all Turtle Bay properties.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work in my Turtle Bay apartment?
faqs.answer: Most flea treatments show significant results within 24-48 hours, with complete elimination typically achieved within 2-3 weeks. This timeline accounts for the flea life cycle and may require a follow-up treatment to ensure all eggs and larvae are eliminated from your Turtle Bay home.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for pets in my Turtle Bay apartment?
faqs.answer: Yes, our flea treatments are specifically designed to be pet-safe when applied correctly. We use EPA-approved products and provide clear instructions for temporarily relocating pets during treatment. Most pets can safely return to treated areas within 2-4 hours after application.

faqs.question: Do I need to prepare my Turtle Bay apartment before flea treatment?
faqs.answer: Yes, preparation includes thorough vacuuming of carpets and furniture, washing pet bedding in hot water, and temporarily removing pets and their food bowls. We provide a detailed preparation checklist specific to your Turtle Bay property to ensure maximum treatment effectiveness.
